zh.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Courtenay於1224年7月26日出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Robert de Courtenay41歲，母親Mary de Vernon42歲。他於大約1233年與Maud de Caneville在英國戴文結婚。他去世於1273年5月3日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特。

zh-hans.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Courtenay于1224年7月26日出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，他的父亲Robert de Courtenay41岁，母亲Mary de Vernon42岁。他于大约1233年与Maud de Caneville在英国戴文结婚。他去世于1273年5月3日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Courtenay was born on 26 July 1224, in Okehampton, Devon, England, his father, Robert de Courtenay, was 41 and his mother, Mary de Vernon, was 42. He married Maud de Caneville about 1233, in Devon, England. He died on 3 May 1273, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Courtenay est né le 26 juillet 1224, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Courtenay, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary de Vernon, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Caneville environ 1233, à Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1273, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Courtenay am 26. Juli 1224 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Courtenay 41 und seine Mutter Mary de Vernon 42. Er hat um 1233 in Devon, England Maud de Caneville geheiratet. Er starb am 3. Mai 1273 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dorset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Courtenay è nato il il 26 luglio 1224 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Robert de Courtenay, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Vernon, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Caneville circa 1233, nel Devon, England. Morì il 3 maggio 1273, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Courtenayが1224年7月26日にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Courtenayは41歳，母Mary de Vernonは42歳であった。約1233年にイギリスデボンでMaud de Canevilleと結婚した。彼は1273年5月3日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Courtenay(이)가 1224년 7월 26일 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Courtenay(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Vernon(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1233년 영국 데폰에서 Maud de Caneville(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1273년 5월 3일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트에 묻혔다.

pt.26 July 1224–3 May 1273: 26 de julho de 1224–3 de maio de 1273
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Courtenay nasceu em 26 de julho de 1224, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Courtenay, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Vernon, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Caneville aproximadamente 1233, em Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1273, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Dorset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Courtenay родился 26 июля 1224 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Courtenay было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary de Vernon, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Caneville около 1233 г. в местности девон, Англия. Он умер 3 мая 1273 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности дорсет, Англия.

es.26 July 1224–3 May 1273: 26 de julio de 1224–3 de mayo de 1273
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Courtenay nació el 26 de julio de 1224, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Courtenay, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary de Vernon, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Maud de Caneville aproximadamente 1233, en Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1273, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Dorset, Inglaterra.
